profile.name: Shobhit Dixit
profile.title: AI/ML Engineer
profile.bio: AI/ML Engineer and Data Scientist with nearly 4 years of experience designing and deploying scalable machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI solutions across financial services and healthcare analytics environments. Expertise in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and AWS for building production-grade ML pipelines, real-time inference systems, and advanced analytics models. Experienced in LLM applications, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), vector databases, feature engineering, and end-to-end MLOps automation to deliver intelligent, data-driven platforms. Proven record of improving model accuracy by 32%, reducing inference latency by 45%, and enabling enterprise AI systems that support high-volume data processing, predictive analytics, and automated decision-making at scale.
